objective: Determine the finite exact Ramsey number R(5,5), currently known to lie between 43 and 46, through a compact 43-vertex lower-bound witness or a certificate-carrying finite upper-bound exclusion.
completion_criteria: For a lower-bound improvement, emit a 43-vertex adjacency list and a separately written exact checker that finds neither a K5 nor an independent 5-set.
For an upper-bound improvement, preserve a deterministic encoding, checked SAT/UNSAT leaf certificates, a checked exhaustive cube cover, and an independent generator-to-graph correspondence audit.
A candidate remains unaccepted until isolated reproduction, current-literature review, and Charlie's recorded approval.
non_results: A graph that passes only a shared or heuristic checker is not a Ramsey witness.
A local-search score, a partial SAT cube set, or an unchecked solver result is not a bound.
A known 42-vertex critical graph, or an unchanged known upper-bound reduction, is not new progress.
A candidate is not a solution until independent and human review are recorded.
synthesis_summary: Initialized as the permanent hard lane because it is a famous finite exact problem with short lower-bound witnesses and certificate-carrying upper-bound routes. No research epoch has run yet.

established_facts.claim: The maintained 2026 Dynamic Survey records 43 <= R(5,5) <= 46 and strong evidence for R(5,5)=43.
established_facts.scope: Current published bounds as of target initialization

strategies.title: Canonical 43-vertex witness search
strategies.mechanism: Generate symmetry-aware 43-vertex graphs, score exact K5 and independent-5 violations, and retain only candidates checked by a separate adjacency-list verifier.
strategies.hypothesis: A structural or local-search construction can produce a previously unknown (5,5,43)-graph.
strategies.discriminating_test: Reproduce a published 42-vertex critical graph with two independent exact checkers, then require any 43-vertex candidate to pass both before considering it a witness.
strategies.blocker: No audited construction corpus or independent checker has yet been installed.

strategies.title: Certified finite upper-bound reduction
strategies.mechanism: Encode normalized (5,5,n)-graphs deterministically, split a fixed cube cover, independently check every SAT witness or UNSAT proof, and check that the cubes cover the normalized search space.
strategies.hypothesis: A reproducible reduction can tighten the 46 upper bound or yield a useful formally checked subcase.
strategies.discriminating_test: On a published toy Ramsey instance, reproduce an exact answer with an independently checked CNF-to-graph encoder, proof-checked leaves, and a checked cover before scaling.
strategies.blocker: The current 46 proof and its artifact/licensing/reproduction path have not yet been audited.

open_leads.description: Audit the 2026 Dynamic Survey and the R(5,5)<=46 source paper, then identify an openly reproducible 42-vertex construction and its provenance.
open_leads.rationale: Known controls and current-status verification are required before any original construction search.
open_leads.next_experiment: Write two minimal independent adjacency-list checkers, reproduce the control's K5/independent-5 counts, and hash the input/output.

open_leads.description: Implement a toy certificate-carrying Ramsey SAT pipeline before touching the 43-46 frontier.
open_leads.rationale: It tests encoder, proof logging, independent checking, and cube-cover accounting at low cost.
open_leads.next_experiment: Prove one known small Ramsey instance with a deterministic CNF, at most 16 cubes, checked leaf proofs, and an independently checked cover.

unresolved_questions: Does an openly reusable artifact set exist for the current 46 upper-bound proof?
Which 42-vertex critical graph corpus and maintainer should be treated as the primary construction control?
Can the hard-lane resource ceiling retain and independently verify proof logs at a useful cube granularity?

next_session.objective: Establish audited controls and a pair of independent exact verifiers before searching for a 43-vertex witness.
next_session.first_action: Read the current survey and source paper, obtain a cited 42-vertex critical graph, and write two non-importing adjacency-list checkers that enumerate all 5-subsets.
next_session.stop_condition: Stop after the control either passes both checkers with identical counts or the first source/provenance discrepancy is recorded. Do not begin 43-vertex search without a passing control.
